traverse.description: visitor is null triggers Validate.notNull(visitor) exception
pseudocode: NodeVisitor visitor = null; Node root = new Node();

traverse.description: root is null triggers Validate.notNull(root) exception
pseudocode: NodeVisitor visitor = noOpVisitor(); Node root = null;

traverse.description: single node with no children visits head and tail once
traverse.precondition: visitor records calls; root has no children
traverse.expectedResult: visitor.head called once with depth=0; visitor.tail called once with depth=0
pseudocode: Node root = new Node(); NodeVisitor visitor = spyVisitor();

traverse.description: two-level tree descends into child then ascends
traverse.precondition: root with one child; visitor records calls
traverse.expectedResult: visitor.head called on root(depth0) then child(depth1), visitor.tail on child then root
pseudocode: Node root = new Node(); Node child = new Node(); root.appendChild(child); NodeVisitor visitor = spyVisitor();

traverse.precondition: parent with two children; visitor records sequence
traverse.expectedResult: visitor.head and tail called for each node in document order: first child then second child
pseudocode: Node root = new Node(); Node c1=new Node(); Node c2=new Node(); root.appendChild(c1); root.appendChild(c2); NodeVisitor v=spyVisitor();
assert sequence of head/tail calls matches document order for root,c1 then c2

traverse.description: visitor.head replaces node triggers replace branch
traverse.precondition: visitor.head replaces each node with a new node at same index
traverse.expectedResult: traversal continues on replaced node without tail of removed original
pseudocode: Node root with one child; NodeVisitor visitor that in head() does parent.replaceChild(node,newNode);
assert traversal on replacement node only; original never got tail

traverse.description: visitor.head removes node triggers removal branch with next sibling null
traverse.precondition: root with single child; visitor.head removes child
traverse.expectedResult: child head called then removed; traversal climbs to root then tail only root
pseudocode: Node root=new Node(); Node child=new Node(); root.appendChild(child); NodeVisitor visitor that in head() does node.remove();
assert only head(child,0) then head(root,0) then tail(root,0)

traverse.description: visitor.head removes node with next sibling not null triggers removal branch and tail skip
traverse.precondition: root with two children; visitor.head removes first child
traverse.expectedResult: first child head only, no tail; then head and tail on second child and root
pseudocode: Node root=new Node(); Node c1=new Node(), c2=new Node(); root.appendChild(c1); root.appendChild(c2); NodeVisitor visitor removes node in head
assert c1 head only; c2 head/tail and root tail

traverse.description: assertion enabled and node null triggers AssertionError at B15
traverse.precondition: JVM assertions enabled; simulate node null at assertion
pseudocode: NodeVisitor visitor stub; Node root stubbed to produce null nextSibling and depth>0

traverse.description: traverse(Elements) with empty list does nothing
traverse.expectedResult: no exception; no traversal on visitor
pseudocode: Elements els = new Elements(); NodeVisitor visitor = spyVisitor();

traverse.description: traverse(Elements) with two elements invokes traverse(Node) twice
traverse.precondition: Elements contains two Element roots; standard visitor records root heads
traverse.expectedResult: visitor.head called for each root twice at depth0; tails accordingly
pseudocode: Elements els = new Elements(el1,el2); NodeVisitor visitor = spyVisitor();
assert head called on el1 and el2 at depth0
